critical_risks.issue: FP8 (e4m3fn) rounds small LoRA gradients to zero
Mixed precision (float8 + bfloat16) causes CUDA crashes or VRAM overflow
critical_risks.remedy: Force cast inputs to bfloat16 before addition

torchao_best_practices.filter_fn_logic: Exclude trainable params from quantization: `if hasattr(module, 'requires_grad') and module.requires_grad: return False`
torchao_best_practices.scaling_guard: Avoid FP8 for AdaLN-Zero and x_embedder layers

action_items_for_lora_core: Assert `p.dtype == torch.bfloat16` for trainable params before optimization
Copy LoRA gradients to float32 master weights

Strict 16-channel latent structure required for VAE integration

AdaLayerNorm-Zero.description: FP8 (e4m3fn) overflow in time-step modulation coefficients
AdaLayerNorm-Zero.impact: Chaotic trajectory steps in Rectified Flow

Latent Geometry.description: Strict 16-channel layout required for VAE integration

action_items: Block FP8 quantization for LoRA weights

requirements: No slicing operations that alter latent dimensions

forward_override.logic: self.org_module.forward = self.forward (Preserve original parameters via self.org_forward(x))

architectural_critical_fixes.solution: Forcefully isolate tensor slices to float32 BEFORE sampling
Execute matrix adaptation strictly inside standard floating formats
Divide expanded_timestep by 1000.0 in transformer cross-attention ingestion layer
Implement explicit comma-separated layer substring matching filters

lora_core_v02.py: Mirror Kohya line 206 tracking logic for norm validation in float32
Inject gradient norm logging sequences mimicking target model updates
Implement substring pattern filters to guard trainable parameters from torchao FP8 hooks
generate_v02.py: Inject timestep = expanded_timestep / 1000.0 in transformer parameter call

details.logic: self.org_module.forward = self.forward (Preserve original parameters via self.org_forward(x))

details.initialize_norm_cache: Isolate tensor slices to float32 before sampling
details.merge_to_Inference_Node: Execute matrix adaptation in standard floating formats
details.FluxSampler_Timestep_Normalization: Divide expanded_timestep by 1000.0 in transformer layer
details.ModuleFilter_Protocol: Use strict substring matching for critical layers

mathematical_core.dynamics: Deterministic ODE trajectories between clean data (z_1) and Gaussian noise (z_0)
mathematical_core.gradient_variance: Low variance stabilizes training; low-precision boundaries destabilize

stability_failure_modes.issue: Uniform sampling wastes gradients at t->0 and t->1
stability_failure_modes.solution: Force logit-normal distribution bias towards t~0.5

stability_failure_modes.issue: FP8 overflow in scale/shift coefficients injects chaotic noise
stability_failure_modes.solution: Clamp or isolate timestep embedding MLPs in bfloat16

actions: Replace uniform t sampling with logit-normal distribution
Inject gradient clipping (max_norm=1.0) before optimizer step
Avoid random interpolation shuffling within mini-batch

details.purpose: Bias sampling towards t~0.5 for structural flow matching

details.mechanism: Isolate timestep embedding MLPs in bfloat16
details.purpose: Prevent FP8 overflow and chaotic noise injection

double_stream.description: Parallel text/image streams with independent QKV weights

single_stream.description: Concatenated stream with shared QKV weights

positional_embedding.mechanism: Rotary Positional Embedding (RoPE) on H/W axes
positional_embedding.purpose: Adapt to aspect ratios without structural distortion

filter_fn_logic.description: Ignore layers with 'lora' in name to prevent quantization

gradient_updates.mechanism: Master Weights (float32) for LoRA gradient updates

trajectory_properties.non_crossing: ODE paths must not intersect to avoid singularity
trajectory_properties.distribution: Logit-Normal or U-shaped t-sampling for stability

gradient_clipping.purpose: Prevent gradient spikes in FP8 training
